title: prediction-market-v1
description: Prediction market service contract v1 — 20 operations across discovery, pricing, portfolio, trading, and system management. Designed for binary-outcome and multi-outcome prediction markets (Polymarket, Kalshi, Metaculus, Manifold).

operations.name: events
operations.description: List prediction events with filters (active, featured, tags, date range)

operations.name: markets
operations.description: List markets within events, with outcome prices and metadata

operations.name: orderbook
operations.description: Order book depth for a market token (bids, asks, sizes)

operations.name: prices
operations.description: Current prices (best bid, ask, midpoint, last trade)

operations.name: positions
operations.description: User's open positions with entry price and current value

operations.name: search
operations.description: Search events and markets by keyword

operations.name: login_status
operations.description: Auth state, wallet info, write gate, geoblocking status, rate limits

operations.name: keepalive
operations.description: Session heartbeat to prevent expiry

operations.name: price_history
operations.description: Historical prices with configurable fidelity/granularity

operations.name: spread
operations.description: Bid-ask spread for a market token

operations.name: trade_history
operations.description: User's trade history with timestamps and settlement

operations.name: portfolio_value
operations.description: Total portfolio valuation across all positions

operations.name: trending
operations.description: Featured or trending markets by volume/activity

operations.name: categories
operations.description: Tags or categories for filtering events

operations.name: closing_soon
operations.description: Markets approaching resolution deadline

operations.name: leaderboard
operations.description: Trader rankings by profit or volume

operations.name: place_order
operations.description: Place an order (real funds). Requires write gate + confirm gate

operations.name: cancel_order
operations.description: Cancel an open order

operations.name: cancel_all
operations.description: Cancel all open orders

operations.name: approve_allowance
operations.description: Approve token spending allowance (on-chain)
